## Checks

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run verify:migration`
- [ ] `npm run review:content`
- [ ] `npm run verify:links`

## URL Safety

- [ ] Existing `/YYYY/MM/DD/:slug/` article URLs are unchanged, or redirects were added intentionally.
- [ ] RSS, sitemap, and Cloudflare `_redirects` still build correctly.
- [ ] Any changed `ogImage` values were checked in both metadata and article cover rendering.
